title: Danger Dog
description: Don’t despair, Danger Dog is here to protect the city from villains, alien invasion, and ruff politicians.
quote: The mayor’s barf is worse than his bite.
creator: Jeff Jenkins
altHero: Danger Dog, a blue superhero dog
alt1: alien ship blasting yellow lasers at a town
alt2: mother dog barfing into her stroller
alt4: the mayor barfing into a trash can
